$comment: Canonical Studio Thielman design tokens. Keep in sync with tailwind.config.js. Fetch URL: https://studiothielman.com/brand.json

voice.headlineStyle: Short, benefit-led; mix uppercase section labels with bold H1

secondary.usage: Page backgrounds, inverse text on dark

tailwindClasses.sectionLabel: text-sm uppercase tracking-wider text-white/60 or text-text-secondary

hero.pattern: Full-width dark section (bg-gray-900 + gradient overlay), centered copy, -mt-20 pt-20 to tuck under fixed header
hero.title: text-4xl md:text-6xl font-bold text-white
hero.subtitle: text-xl text-white/80 max-w-2xl mx-auto

header.behavior: Fixed top; transparent on hero, solid white with shadow after scroll

button.base: font-semibold rounded-lg transition-all duration-150 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-cta/50

variants.cta: bg-cta text-white border-2 border-cta shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl font-bold px-8 py-4

card.default: bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-xl p-6 md:p-8

input.default: w-full px-4 py-3 border-2 border-gray-300 rounded-lg bg-gray-50 focus:border-cta focus:ring-cta/20

accordion.process: border-2 border-gray-200 rounded-2xl shadow-xl; step title text-4xl md:text-5xl font-bold
accordion.faq: border border-gray-200 rounded-xl; chevron rotate on expand

badge.popular: bg-cta text-white text-xs font-bold px-3 py-1 rounded-full uppercase

do: Use black & white as dominant palette with gray-50 section alternation
Use uppercase tracking-wider labels above section titles
Keep generous whitespace and max-w-7xl centered containers
Use rounded-xl for cards and rounded-lg for buttons/inputs
Use dark heroes with white text for page intros
dont: Do not use bright saturated brand colors (no blue/purple primary)
Do not use decorative serif headlines unless explicitly requested
Do not use heavy gradients except hero dark overlays
Do not use sharp 0-radius buttons (brand uses rounded-lg+)
promptSnippet: Design in Studio Thielman style: minimal black-and-white web studio aesthetic, system sans-serif, gray-900 dark heroes with white H1, uppercase section labels, white cards with border-gray-200 rounded-xl and subtle hover lift, black CTA buttons with white text, max-w-7xl containers, py-20 sections. Colors: primary #000, text #2D2D2D, secondary text #666, accent bg #F5F5F5.
